---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - theme.scss
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    page-layout: full
---

# Resume

::: {.highlight-box}
## Jeffrey Hsu

Digital Marketing | Marketing Analytics | Data Storytelling  

Alhambra, California  
hsujeffrey3@gmail.com  
[GitHub](https://github.com/hsujeffrey) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/)
:::

## Download Resume

[Download PDF Resume](Jeffrey%20Updated%20Resume%20Aug%202023.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

# Professional Summary

::: {.project-card}
Marketing and analytics professional with experience in digital strategy, campaign management, dashboard reporting, SEO, social media analytics, and audience engagement. Experienced in connecting marketing decisions with performance metrics through analytics platforms, dashboards, content strategy, and reporting tools.
:::

# Education

::: {.project-card}
## California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

**Master of Science in Digital Marketing**

Focus areas include marketing analytics, dashboard reporting, attribution analysis, SEO, paid media, data storytelling, and website analytics.
:::

# Professional Experience

## Marketing & Social Media Coordinator | UI/UX Lead  
### Los Angeles Police Protective League

::: {.project-card}
**May 2022 to Present**

- Increased Instagram reach by 24%, visits by 13%, and generated over 1,700 new followers
- Increased Facebook reach by 27.9% and generated over 1,200 new page likes
- Increased Twitter impressions by 32% through content optimization
- Redesigned company websites using WordPress, Drupal, HTML, and CSS
- Increased member sign-ups by over 35%
- Increased email conversion rates by 20%
- Launched and branded a company podcast that exceeded 1,000 downloads within one month
- Helped generate over $79,000 in ticket sales for a company course subsidiary
:::

## Digital Marketing Lead  
### Center for Customer Insights & Digital Marketing

::: {.project-card}
**July 2021 to May 2022**

- Managed digital marketing campaigns and workshop promotions
- Improved email open rates to 33% and click-through rates to 4.2%
- Reduced bounce rate from 35% to 14%
- Presented an Instagram Marketing workshop to marketing professionals
- Helped improve social media KPIs across audience growth and engagement
:::

## Head of Marketing  
### Global Impex USA

::: {.project-card}
**December 2020 to June 2021**

- Led marketing operations across e-commerce, design, and social media
- Managed influencer and athlete product launches
- Generated over $40,000 in annual revenue through digital campaigns
- Improved website traffic and reduced cart abandonment rates
- Supported SEO and paid advertising campaigns
:::

## Digital Marketing Intern  
### marketANDgrow

::: {.project-card}
**November 2020 to March 2021**

- Produced weekly marketing podcast content
- Increased Instagram engagement by over 200%
- Wrote SEO-friendly blog posts and digital content
- Analyzed competitor performance and digital trends
:::

# Skills

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Marketing Skills</span>

- SEO
- CRO and A/B Testing
- Email Marketing
- Social Media Marketing
- Paid Social Advertising
- Influencer Marketing
- KPI Reporting
- Brand Positioning
- UI/UX Design
:::

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Tools & Platforms</span>

- R and Quarto
- GA4 and BigQuery
- HubSpot
- Constant Contact
- WordPress
- Shopify
- Squarespace
- Drupal
- Adobe Photoshop
- Premiere Pro
- Canva
:::

:::

:::
